final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow announcing the GPT-5.5 launch, with 奥特曼 as the speaker.

Style/medium: needs a high-stakes China domestic roadshow pitch deck aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single landscape slide cover layout with clear hierarchy: headline, speaker name, event context
Subject: must include GPT-5.5 launch announcement as the central theme, 奥特曼 as named speaker
Scene/backdrop: needs a premium tech-finance backdrop — exact visual treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, authoritative GP/VC roadshow atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with top-tier GP institutional tone — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished, print-ready slide surface feel — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" (headline, prominent), "奥特曼" (speaker name), and roadshow context copy in Chinese
Constraints: must conform to China domestic roadshow (路演) visual conventions; must reflect GP institutional调性
Avoid: consumer app store aesthetics, overly casual or startup-garage look
